info.title: USITC Dataweb API
info.description: This page provides API endpoints that provide public data. Note: some endpoints require an API token, which can be generated/copied from the API page in the Dataweb application, https://dataweb.usitc.com/api-key (requires login). To use your API token with swagger, click on the AUTHORIZE button on the right and paste in the token.

post.description: Returns a list of countries for a given tariff group code.
Returns a list of countries for a given tariff group code.
Returns a list of countries for a given tariff group code.
Returns a list of countries for a given tariff group code.
Returns a tariff information for a give country and commodity ID (HTS number).
Returns the detailed data for a single tariff agreement program.
Returns a list of HTS numbers.
Returns a user all the parameters of a saved query based on user specific query ID.
Returns import export data based on sent query parameters.
Returns a list of all rate provision codes.
Returns a list of all rate provision code groups.
Returns a list of all import programs.
Returns the list of districts in a user saved district group.
Returns the list of countries in a user saved country group.
Returns the list of commodities in a user saved commodities group.

Returns a list of commodities based on comma separated list of search terms for a given commodity system classification level. Supplying a commodity classification system level of null will search all levels.

Returns a list of commodities based on comma separated list of search terms (numbers only) for a given commodity system classification level. Supplying a commodity classification system level of null will search all levels.
Returns a list of the user defined commodities groups along with all the corresponding commodities within the group. Trade type and classification is required.
Returns a list system commodity groups, i.e. ones administered through the dataweb admin app.
Returns a list commodity numbers a particular level, classification system and trade type (import/export).
Returns a list of translated commodity classification system number i.e. from HTS to SITC.
Returns a list of all of commodity numbers with descriptions for a commodity classification system.

get.description: Returns a list of tariff programs with descriptions.
Returns the current year for which the database has tariff information.
Returns details about a particular HTS8 number and year.
Returns  list of all system defined saved queries.
Returns a list of all queries a user has shared.
Returns a list of all queries a user has saved.
Returns the list of unit conversion objects.
Returns current year, month, and quarter information.
Returns as list of user defined district groups along with all the corresponding districts and their respective district in the group.
Returns a list of all districts with their respective district codes.
Return a list of user defined country groups along with all the corresponding countries and respective country codes in the group.
Return a list of default system defined country groups with their corresponding list of countries.
Returns a list of all countries with their respective country codes.
Returns a list of the user defined commodities groups along with all the corresponding commodities within the group.
